research_findings.product_gap_analyzer: 16 findings — no backlog inspection, no pause/resume, no collaborate re-entry, no memory update post-onboarding, force mode structurally broken, no progress feedback
research_findings.security_auditor: 10 findings — no .gitignore, state.json phase injection, current_prd path traversal, force mode bypasses guardrails, template variable prompt injection risk
